AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Financial Account
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Financial account used to deposit / withdrawal money such as bank accounts or petty cash
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Financial account used to deposit / withdrawal money such as bank accounts or petty cash

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Language
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A method of communication being used.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Language identifies the language to use for display

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Currency
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An accepted medium of monetary exchange that may vary across countries.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Business Partner
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Reference
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The data type of this field.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Reference displays the source document number.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Active
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Organization
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_COLUMN.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Payment Terms
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The setup and timing defined to complete a specified payment.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Payment Terms identify the method and timing of payment for this transaction.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Description
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Creation Date
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record is completed.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created field indicates the date that this record was created.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Cost Center
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Division that adds to the cost of an organization
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Division that adds to the cost of an organization. Internal structure for cost allocation.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Country
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A state or a nation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Country defines a Country. Each Country must be defined before it can be used in any document.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Price List
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A catalog of selected items with prices defined generally or for a specific partner.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Price Lists are used to determine the pricing, margin and cost of items purchased or sold.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Document Type
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A value defining what sequence and process setup are used to handle this document.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Document Type determines document sequence and processing rules

AD_COLUMN.NAME: 1st Dimension
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Payment Method
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: It is the method by which payment is expected to be made or received.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: 2nd Dimension
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A display of optional elements that are previously defined for this account combination.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The user defined element displays the optional elements that have been defined for this account combination.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: User/Contact
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An acquaintance to reach for information related to the business partner.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The User identifies a unique user in the system. This could be an internal user or a business partner contact

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Invoice
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A document listing products, quantities and prices, payment terms, etc.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Invoice ID uniquely identifies an Invoice Document.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Client
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Business Partner Category
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A classification of business partners based on defined similarities.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: A way of grouping business partners together for classification and reporting purposes. Provides a method of defining certain defaults to be used when opening new business partners.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Product
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An item produced by a process.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Identifies an item which is either purchased or sold in this organization.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Created By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who created this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Created By field indicates the user who created this record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Automatic Payment
AD_COLUMN.HELP: Automatically create the payment when the invoice is completed.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The date that this record was last updated
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated field indicates the date that this record was updated.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: Updated By
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: User who updated this records
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Updated By field indicates the user who updated this record.
